issues.description: Card text says 'Trash 1 card from the top of your deck' but DSL uses TrashFromHand. Should be TrashFromDeck or equivalent deck-trashing action.
Missing condition: PowerBoost should only apply IF trashed card has cost ≥6. Current DSL applies boost unconditionally.
Second effect (Trigger with PlayFromHand Black Character ≤3 cost) has no basis in card text. This appears to be from a different card entirely.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct, but card says 'during this battle' which should map to DuringBattle, not EndOfBattle (semantic distinction).
